smg.text: Very hot. Mainly fine. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few showers later. Force 2 to 3 west to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 3 north to northwesterly winds, becoming easterlies with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds.
